_source.name: PowerTwin asset_subtype -> DOE Reference Building / OpenStudio Standards prototype crosswalk
_source.secondary_reference: NREL openstudio-standards space type / occupant density tables (https://github.com/NREL/openstudio-standards/blob/master/lib/openstudio-standards/standards/ashrae_90_1/ashrae_90_1_2013/data/ashrae_90_1_2013.spc_typ.json)
_source.tertiary_reference: PNNL-32815 Commercial Building Prototypes Based on CBECS (https://www.pnnl.gov/main/publications/external/technical_reports/PNNL-32815.pdf)
_source.notes: PowerTwin asset_subtypes uses EIA CBECS Principal Building Activity (PBA) vocabulary. The dynamic-defaults lookup tables (openstudio_standards_people_per_area, cbecs2018_envelope window_to_wall_ratio_by_building_type) use DOE Reference Building / OpenStudio Standards prototype names. Without translation the resolver returns None for ~85% of commercial subtypes and falls through to the national flat default. Aliases below come from two sources: (1) NREL ComStock's published crosswalk between CBECS PBAPLUS and ComStock's 14 building prototypes -- the high-confidence subset; (2) OpenStudio Standards space type entries that exist outside the ComStock 14 (Laboratory, Courthouse, SuperMarket) and so are usable for occupant-density lookups but may not have matching WWR entries -- the broader-coverage subset. Categories with no canonical DOE/ASHRAE prototype are intentionally OMITTED so the resolver returns None and falls back to flat defaults. Omitted: Religious worship, Public assembly, Service, Nursing, Refrigerated warehouse, Enclosed mall, Vacant. Within Education and Lodging the PowerTwin label collapses CBECS sub-categories (Elementary/middle vs High school; Hotel vs Motel/inn) -- the alias picks the more common archetype as a single default and notes the alternative (Education: PrimarySchool default, SecondarySchool above ~120k ft^2; Lodging: SmallHotel default, LargeHotel above ~50k ft^2). Refine with area-based splits if/when occupants or WWR for the larger archetype materially diverges.

_omitted_explicit._notes: Documented for clarity -- these PowerTwin asset_subtypes are intentionally NOT mapped. The resolver returns None for them and the caller falls back to the national flat default. Listed here so future maintainers don't reintroduce speculative proxies.
_omitted_explicit.Religious worship: no DOE Reference Building prototype; ComStock crosswalk has no entry
_omitted_explicit.Public assembly: no canonical prototype; spans theaters, civic gathering, athletic facilities
_omitted_explicit.Service: no canonical prototype; CBECS spans vehicle dealers, repair shops, salons
_omitted_explicit.Nursing: Hospital is acute-care-focused, not a clean proxy
_omitted_explicit.Refrigerated warehouse: ComStock crosswalk only maps non-refrigerated; HVAC profile differs materially
_omitted_explicit.Enclosed mall: ComStock crosswalk only maps strip shopping mall; enclosed has no entry
